sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἄργυρος

- Transliteration: Arguros

- Phonetic: ar'-goo-ros

- Definition:

1. silver

a. 1 Cor. 3:12 refers to the silver with which the columns of noble buildings were covered and the rafters adorned

b. things made of silver

1. vessels

2. images of gods

- Origin: from argos (shining)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From ἀργός argos (shining); silver (the metal in the articles or coin): - silver.
